docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEBRUARY 17, 2017 AT 8:30 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, DEMARCUS AS TO DEFENDANT 473 ELLIS LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DEMARCUS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-16-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DEMARCUS JOHNSON. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 473 ELLIS LP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED DEC-20-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 473 ELLIS LP
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/15/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "TEMPORARILY AWAY-UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 473 ELLIS LP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-16-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF DEMARCUS JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 473 ELLIS LP IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY STEPHAINE WILLIS, PROPERTY SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DEMARCUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 473 ELLIS LP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
